module_summary: This module extracts features from Python code repositories. It counts lines of code, comment density, function definitions, class definitions, loops, if-else statements, and cyclomatic complexity. The module is designed to help analyze code quality and maintainability by providing insights into the structure and complexity of Python projects.

functions.name: count_effective_lines
functions.summary: Counts the number of non-blank, non-comment lines in a list of strings. It skips multi-line comments and single-line comments.

functions.name: count_comment_lines
functions.summary: Counts the number of comment lines in a list of strings. It counts both single-line and multi-line comments.

functions.name: extract_code_features
functions.summary: Extracts code features such as functions, classes, if-else statements, loops, LOC, cyclomatic complexity, and total function lines from Python files within a repository path.
